tagline: A territory-based senior home care franchise with 24 years of franchising history and $1.29M average territory revenues in the fastest-growing healthcare segment in the US.
description_short: ComForCare delivers non-medical and private-duty nursing home care through an owner-operated territory model where the franchisee drives community relationships and business growth. Average territory gross sales exceeded $1.29M in 2025 across 220 reporting territories, with a standard single-unit investment well under $165K. This is a strong cash-flow opportunity in a demographic market with no demand ceiling.
market_intelligence_insight: US home healthcare market valued at $162B in 2024 and projected to reach $381B by 2033 at 10% CAGR; 11,400 Americans turn 65 daily and 90% prefer aging in place, creating durable structural demand for non-medical home care.
item_19_headline: Average territory gross sales of $1.29M in 2025 with median of $850K across 220 reporting franchisees
ongoing_support: field visits 32-40 hours annually, bi-weekly Rise-Up meetings first 6 months, phone and helpdesk support, operations manual, marketing advisory council, annual conference, regional meetings
